message:
refactor: Continue splitting runtime.zig into focused modules

Extract additional utilities:
- print_utils.zig (20 lines): print, println, is_freestanding
- dynamic_closure.zig (31 lines): DynamicClosure struct
- misc_utils.zig (28 lines): arrayListGet, concat

runtime.zig: 1758 → 1701 lines (another 57 lines extracted)
Total reduction from original: 2565 → 1701 lines (~34%)
